title: ceanothus excelsa
intro: Ceanothus excelsa, also known as the California lilac or blue bush, is a flowering shrub native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ceanothus excelsa include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Ceanothus excelsa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
